si_sql_patchmanager.sql_patch: Create sql_patchmanger table
si_sql_patchmanager.sql_statement: CREATE TABLE si_sql_patchmanager (sql_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY ,sql_patch_ref VARCHAR( 50 ) NOT NULL ,sql_patch VARCHAR( 255 ) NOT NULL ,sql_release VARCHAR( 25 ) NOT NULL ,sql_statement TEXT NOT NULL) ENGINE = MYISAM

si_sql_patchmanager.sql_patch: Start
Update extensions table
si_sql_patchmanager.sql_statement: UPDATE si_extensions SET id = 0 WHERE name = core LIMIT 1

si_sql_patchmanager.sql_patch: Set domain_id on system defaults table to 1
Set extension_id on system defaults table to 1
Move all old consulting style invoices to itemised
si_sql_patchmanager.sql_statement: UPDATE si_invoices SET type_id = 2 where type_id = 3

si_sql_patchmanager.sql_patch: Add department to the customers
si_sql_patchmanager.sql_statement: ALTER TABLE si_customers ADD COLUMN department VARCHAR(255) NULL AFTER name

si_sql_patchmanager.sql_patch: Prepare user table for Laravel Fortify
